# removeConnection(_:)

**Instance Method**

Removes a connection from this session.

## Declaration

```swift
func removeConnection(_ connection: MIDINetworkConnection) -> Bool
```

## Parameters

- **connection**: The connection to remove.

## Return Value

[doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true] if the session successfully removed the connection, otherwise [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/false].

## Managing Connections

- **connections()**: Returns the session’s set of MIDI network connections.
- **addConnection(_:)**: Adds a new connection to this session.
